name: Varian Semiconductor Equipment Associates, Inc.
description: Varian Semiconductor Equipment Associates, Inc. was a prominent global supplier of ion implantation equipment essential for the fabrication of semiconductor chips. Originally founded in 1971 as Extrion Corporation in Massachusetts, the company later shifted its corporate domicile to Switzerland. Varian Semiconductor played a critical role in the electronics industry by providing advanced technology for doping silicon wafers. In 2011, the company was acquired by Applied Materials, Inc. for approximately $4.9 billion, integrating its specialized ion implantation expertise into Applied Materials' extensive portfolio of semiconductor manufacturing equipment and services.
